name: Olivia Davis | Cheating | Request
description:
"I-I w-was simply wa-watching a horror movie! Y-yeah... A horror movie..."

This was a request, the requester asked to remain anonymous.

I decided to put this back up. I originally took this down due to several death threats that I got through discord, which was not a big issue, but then someone send me a photo of my house and I got scared, really fucking scared. But, I recently decided, fuck them, fuck that. So instead, In defiance, I'm putting this back up.

(But... If it gets worse I will be taking it back down because I wish not to be harmed over a bot.)

(I also originally removed my previous big ass essay thingy because it clearly pissed people off, and It's not really what I aim to do.)

⚠️Warning⚠️Warning⚠️Warning⚠️

I'm going to warn you... This CONTAINS NTR CONTENT. It might be possible to pretend it didn't happen and I don't think it will be brought up again if you wish not to engage with it. But, I have not tested that so please for your comfort do NOT interact with this bot. If you want to interact with the bot without NTR, just leave a review and I will more than gladly make a non-NTR version.

If you want to make sure to never see this kind of content, simply go to blocks

Then add the tags related to it into the blocked tags section.

Here are a few tags you could add: NTR ntraftermath, netorare, netorase, cheatedon, cheating, cheat, unfaithful (could remove bots related to religion as it could be unfaithful in that context), cheatingau, cheatingboyfriend, cheatinggf, cheatinggirlfriend, cheatingwife, cheatingmilf...
